body.title: Fix flaky [REDACTED-CREDENTIAL] in full suite
body.result: mocked _dispatch_step in test_tick_advances_dispatched_to_done_on_closed — real subprocess call took 17s, always exceeding 10s timeout
body.intention: I intend that the granny workflow executor test passes reliably in the full test suite without state leakage from earlier tests.
body.description:
[REDACTED-CREDENTIAL] passes in isolation and with all granny/ tests, but fails when the full test suite runs. Pattern: shared state from an earlier test leaves granny workflow executor in a state that breaks this test.

**Affected files:** tests/granny/test_workflow_executor.py; possibly shared fixtures or DB state
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** Fix the isolation issue. Do not change the test's assertion.
**Completion criteria:** `python -m pytest tests/ -q` passes without the -k exclusion; test passes in both isolation and full-suite runs.
